results.title: 2010 IEEE CIS Awards [Society News]
results.author: Gary G. Yen
highlights:
# 2010 IEEE CIS Awards [Society News]
...
Including: Neural Networks Pioneer Vladimir Vapnik, NEC Research, Inc., USA. Fuzzy Systems Pioneer Hideo Tanaka, Hiroshima International University, Japan. Evolutionary Computation Pioneer David E. Goldberg, University of Illinois at Urbana Champaign, USA and John Grefenstette, George Mason University, USA. Meritorious Services James M. Keller, University of Missouri, USA. IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems Outstanding Paper, IEEE Transactions on Evolutionary Computation Outstanding Paper, Outstanding Chapter, Outstanding Ph.D. Dissertation. Also past CIS Neural Networks Pioneer Awardees, Fuzzy Systems Pioneer Awardees, Evolutionary Computation Pioneer Awardees and Meritorious Service Awardees.
